# Dickens Alphonce Juma - Portfolio and Resume

This site belongs to Dickens Alphonce Juma, a Tech Lead and Senior Backend Engineer focused on distributed systems, fintech, messaging platforms, and AI.

## Primary Pages
- Portfolio: https://dickensjuma.github.io/Portfolio-Dickens/

- Backend Engineering
- Distributed Systems
- Event-Driven Architecture
- FinTech and Payment Infrastructure
- Messaging Integrations
